layout.sidebar: fixed left-0 top-0 h-screen w-20 flex flex-col items-center py-6 border-r border-white/10 bg-zinc-950/80 backdrop-blur-xl z-50
layout.main_container: ml-20 min-h-screen bg-zinc-950 text-white relative flex flex-col
layout.page_wrapper: max-w-6xl w-full mx-auto p-6 md:p-10 flex-grow
layout.chat_container: max-w-4xl mx-auto w-full h-[calc(100vh-8rem)] flex flex-col pt-10 pb-32
layout.chat_input_area: fixed bottom-8 left-[calc(50%+2.5rem)] -translate-x-1/2 w-[calc(100%-7rem)] max-w-3xl bg-zinc-900/90 backdrop-blur-2xl border border-white/10 rounded-full p-2 pl-6 flex items-center shadow-2xl z-40
layout.bento_grid: grid grid-cols-1 md:grid-cols-2 lg:grid-cols-3 gap-6 auto-rows-[200px]

components.chat_bubble_user: bg-gradient-to-br from-indigo-600 to-purple-600 text-white rounded-3xl rounded-tr-sm px-6 py-4 shadow-lg ml-auto max-w-[80%] font-medium text-[15px] leading-relaxed
components.chat_bubble_ai: bg-zinc-900/80 border border-white/5 text-zinc-200 rounded-3xl rounded-tl-sm px-6 py-4 mr-auto max-w-[85%] flex flex-col gap-2 items-start shadow-sm text-[15px] leading-relaxed
components.card: bg-zinc-900/40 border border-white/5 rounded-3xl p-6 backdrop-blur-md transition-all duration-300 hover:border-white/15 hover:-translate-y-1 hover:shadow-2xl hover:shadow-purple-500/10 flex flex-col
components.sidebar_item: w-12 h-12 flex items-center justify-center rounded-2xl transition-all duration-200 text-zinc-400 hover:text-white hover:bg-white/5 cursor-pointer
components.sidebar_item_active: w-12 h-12 flex items-center justify-center rounded-2xl text-white bg-white/10 shadow-[inset_0_1px_0_0_rgba(255,255,255,0.1)] cursor-pointer

images.description: Premium AI ethereal background. Add fixed position behind everything: `fixed inset-0 w-full h-full object-cover pointer-events-none z-0 opacity-20 mix-blend-screen`.
User profile avatar for the chat interface.

instructions_to_main_agent: Install Google Fonts 'Outfit' (headings) and 'Manrope' (body) in index.html.
Install Shadcn primitives: tooltip, button, input, textarea, form, card, avatar, scroll-area, dropdown-menu, calendar.
Implement an icon-only Sidebar (fixed w-20 on the left). CRITICAL: Use Shadcn Tooltip for accessible hover labels.
Chat Page (Route '/'): AI typing indicator, chat bubbles using `chat_bubble_user` and `chat_bubble_ai`. The input area must be fixed to the bottom using `chat_input_area`.
Reminders Page (Route '/reminders'): Create a responsive bento grid using the `card` component styles. Integrate Shadcn Calendar for due dates.
Feedback Page (Route '/feedback'): Centered layout. Use Shadcn Form, Input, and Textarea. Add Sonner for success toast notifications.
Ensure the ethereal AI background image is positioned statically behind the application content using `fixed inset-0 -z-10`.
CRITICAL: All interactive elements must include a `data-testid` attribute (e.g. `data-testid="chat-input"`, `data-testid="nav-reminders"`).
Apply `framer-motion` for page transitions and chat bubble entrance effects (`initial={{ opacity: 0, y: 10 }}`).
